languages.text: Подаренный Вольному Торговцу имплантационный трон приоткрыл генеторам Сектора Бионика тайну сохранения жизни в металле. Еретические исследования превратили отринувших запреты техножрецов в бессмертных монстров, подпитывающихся соками еще живых слуг. Отныне ни одна рана на флагмане не была неизлечима — но ценой за это часто становилась душа и свобода раненого.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The heretical research turned the renegade Tech-Priests into immortal monsters fuelled by the humours of still-living servants. After that, no injury was incurable on the flagship — but the price was often the patient's soul and freedom.
languages.original_text: Подаренный Вольному Торговцу имплантационный трон приоткрыл генеторам Сектора Бионика тайну сохранения жизни в металле. Еретические исследования превратили отринувших запреты техножрецов в бессмертных монстров, подпитывающихся соками еще живых слуг. Отныне ни одна рана на флагмане не была неизлечима — но ценой за это часто становилась душа и свобода раненого.

traits.locale_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The heretical research turned the renegade Tech-Priests into immortal monsters fuelled by the humours of still-living servants. After that, no injury was incurable on the flagship — but the price was often the patient's soul and freedom.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The heretical research turned the renegade chirurgeons into immortal monsters fuelled by the humours of still-living servants. After that, no injury was incurable on the flagship — but the price was often the patient's soul and freedom.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The heretical research turned the renegade chirurgeons into immortal monsters fuelled by the humours of still-living servants. After that, no injury was incurable on the flagship — but the price was often the patient's soul and freedom.

The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The heretical research turned the renegade Tech-Priests into immortal monsters fuelled by the humours of still-living servants. After that, no injury was incurable on the flagship — but the price was often the patient's soul and freedom.

languages.text: セクター・ビオニカの外科医たちは、ルーグ・トレーダーに贈られた移植用王座によって、金属に永遠に保存された生命の秘密を解き明かしました。この異端の研究によって、反逆の外科医たちは、まだ生きているしもべの体液を動力源とする不老不死の怪物へと変貌しました。その結果、旗艦ではもはやどんな傷も治せなくなりましたが、その代償はしばしば患者の魂と自由でした。
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the eternal preservation of life in metal for the chirurgeons of the Sector Bionica. The heretical research turned the renegade chirurgeons into immortal monsters fuelled by the humours of still-living servants. After that, no injury was incurable on the flagship — but the price was often the patient's soul and freedom.

traits.locale_text: セクター・ビオニカの外科医たちは、ルーグ・トレーダーに贈られた移植用王座によって、金属に永遠に保存された生命の秘密を解き明かしました。この異端の研究によって、反逆の外科医たちは、まだ生きているしもべの体液を動力源とする不老不死の怪物へと変貌しました。その結果、旗艦ではもはやどんな傷も治せなくなりましたが、その代償はしばしば患者の魂と自由でした。

languages.text: 进献给行商浪人的移植王座，为仿生区的基因士们揭开了将生命贮存于金属之中的奥秘。有了这项异端研究，叛道技术神甫们就能变身为以活人体液驱动的不朽怪物。自此，旗舰上再也没有无法治愈的伤患，但代价往往是患者的灵魂与自由。
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The heretical research turned the renegade Tech-Priests into immortal monsters fuelled by the humours of still-living servants. After that, no injury was incurable on the flagship — but the price was often the patient's soul and freedom.

traits.locale_text: 进献给行商浪人的移植王座，为仿生区的基因士们揭开了将生命贮存于金属之中的奥秘。有了这项异端研究，叛道技术神甫们就能变身为以活人体液驱动的不朽怪物。自此，旗舰上再也没有无法治愈的伤患，但代价往往是患者的灵魂与自由。

languages.text: Le fauteuil d'implantation offert {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} révéla aux genetors du secteur Bionica qu'il était possible de préserver la vie dans le métal. Ces recherches hérétiques transformèrent les technoprêtres renégats en monstres immortels, alimentés par les humeurs de serviteurs toujours vivants. Par la suite, il devint possible de soigner n'importe quelle blessure à bord du vaisseau amiral, mais le traitement coûtait souvent son âme et sa liberté au patient.
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The heretical research turned the renegade Tech-Priests into immortal monsters fuelled by the humours of still-living servants. After that, no injury was incurable on the flagship — but the price was often the patient's soul and freedom.

traits.locale_text: Le fauteuil d'implantation offert {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande} révéla aux genetors du secteur Bionica qu'il était possible de préserver la vie dans le métal. Ces recherches hérétiques transformèrent les technoprêtres renégats en monstres immortels, alimentés par les humeurs de serviteurs toujours vivants. Par la suite, il devint possible de soigner n'importe quelle blessure à bord du vaisseau amiral, mais le traitement coûtait souvent son âme et sa liberté au patient.

languages.text: El trono de implantación de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente reveló a los genetores del sector Bionica los secretos de la preservación de la vida mediante el metal. La investigación herética convirtió a los tecnosacerdotes renegados en monstruos inmortales alimentados por los humores de los sirvientes que mantenían vivos. Desde entonces, no había herida incurable en la nave insignia... pero el tratamiento costaba el alma y la libertad del paciente.
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The heretical research turned the renegade Tech-Priests into immortal monsters fuelled by the humours of still-living servants. After that, no injury was incurable on the flagship — but the price was often the patient's soul and freedom.

traits.locale_text: El trono de implantación de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente reveló a los genetores del sector Bionica los secretos de la preservación de la vida mediante el metal. La investigación herética convirtió a los tecnosacerdotes renegados en monstruos inmortales alimentados por los humores de los sirvientes que mantenían vivos. Desde entonces, no había herida incurable en la nave insignia... pero el tratamiento costaba el alma y la libertad del paciente.

languages.text: Hür Tacir'e verilen implantasyon tahtı, Sektör Biyonika Genetörleri için metalde yaşamın korunması konusundaki sır perdesini kaldırdı. Kâfir araştırma, isyancı Tekno Rahipleri hâlâ yaşamakta olan hizmetkârların sıvılarıyla beslenen ölümsüz yaratıklara dönüştürdü. Bundan sonra sancak gemisinde her yara tedavi edilebilir oldu ancak bunun bedeli, genellikle hastanın ruhu ve özgürlüğüydü.
languages.original_text: The implantation throne given to the Rogue Trader lifted the veil on the preservation of life in metal for the Genetors of the Sector Bionica. The heretical research turned the renegade Tech-Priests into immortal monsters fuelled by the humours of still-living servants. After that, no injury was incurable on the flagship — but the price was often the patient's soul and freedom.

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir'e verilen implantasyon tahtı, Sektör Biyonika Genetörleri için metalde yaşamın korunması konusundaki sır perdesini kaldırdı. Kâfir araştırma, isyancı Tekno Rahipleri hâlâ yaşamakta olan hizmetkârların sıvılarıyla beslenen ölümsüz yaratıklara dönüştürdü. Bundan sonra sancak gemisinde her yara tedavi edilebilir oldu ancak bunun bedeli, genellikle hastanın ruhu ve özgürlüğüydü.

languages.text: Der dem Freihändlerder Freihändlerin gewährte Implantationsthron lüftete für die Genetoren im Sektor Bionica den Schleier über der Erhaltung des Lebens in Metall. Die ketzerische Forschung verwandelten die abtrünnigen Techpriester in unsterbliche Monster, die von den Lebenssäften noch lebender Diener genährt wurden. Danach war auf dem Flaggschiff jede Wunde behandelbar ... aber der Patient bezahlte oft mit seiner Seele und seiner Freiheit.
